headline: Mohamed Salah
body: ✅ DONE DEAL 🇪🇬 Mohamed Salah has given his green light to Besiktas! 🦅 🤝 Agreement found on a year deal with option as per Santi_J_FM ✍️ Besiktas wants to complete Salah’s deal early next week for medical and signature. mercato BJK
raw_text:
✅ DONE DEAL 

🇪🇬 Mohamed Salah has given his green light to Besiktas! 🦅

🤝 Agreement found on a year deal with option as per @Santi_J_FM 

✍️ Besiktas wants to complete Salah’s deal early next week for medical and signature. #mercato #BJK
